title: Against range, break distance before the poke becomes unplayable
body: Into ranged or extended-reach top matchups, the melee player cannot accept endless free poke before ever interacting. The core job is to break distance early enough that the lane turns into a real trade or all-in before your HP bar gets chipped into a losing state.
actionables: Identify the earliest moment in the wave where you can break distance without losing too much HP first.
Do not let the lane stay at the enemy's ideal spacing for multiple waves in a row.
Review ranged matchups by checking whether you lost because of one bad engage or because you never closed space at all.

source.title: Jugar asi me convirtio en la mejor camille de europa (te enseno como lo hice)
source.notes: Built from the repeated Camille versus ranged-lane framing: break distance before poke becomes permanent.
